# Feature: Clock

**Status:** Stable

## Summary

The clock supplies the current time of day used to pick a greeting.

## Problem

Greetings depend on the time of day.

## Behavior

### Time source

#### REQ: monotonic

The clock MUST be monotonic.

## Acceptance Criteria

Not defined yet.

## Open Questions

None at this time.
